title: blif .subckt uses wrong indices for input/output vector not starting from 0

features.name: non_zero_indexed_vector_port
features.description: Code should include a module with input or output ports using vector ranges that don't start from 0 (e.g., [32:2] instead of [31:0])

features.name: submodule_instantiation_with_non_zero_indexed_ports
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where ports with non-zero indexed vectors are connected (.a(a), .a_l(a_l))
